strict.rationale_for_score: The summary contains a severe hallucination in the sentence 'bolt is the iaaf/btc general secretary garth gayle said...', which incorrectly conflates Bolt with Garth Gayle (who is identified as the General Secretary in the text). This violates consistency rules strictly. Additionally, the summary suffers from poor coherence due to run-on sentences and awkward phrasing ('the world 's fastest man will be in the bahamas next month' lacks a clear subject connection). While it captures some key facts, the hallucination and disjointed structure make it very poor.

lenient.rationale_for_score: The summary contains a significant hallucination in the sentence 'bolt is the iaaf/btc general secretary garth gayle said...'. It incorrectly conflates Bolt with Garth Gayle (who is the General Secretary), creating a factual error not present in the source. Additionally, the attribution of the quote 'best to make his country proud' to Gayle instead of Bolt is inconsistent with the text. While the summary covers the main points and is generally fluent, these consistency errors prevent it from being rated higher.

lenient.adjustment_notes: I agree with the strict judge's assessment.
